title.en: Medical devices - Symbols to be used with information to be supplied by the manufacturer - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 与制造商提供的信息一起使用的符号 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Identifies requirements for symbols used in labelling of medical devices. Edition 4. EN ISO 15223-1:2021 harmonized under EU MDR.
standards.scope: Standardized symbols for medical device labelling.
standards.note: Harmonized under EU MDR. Covers symbols for manufacturer, date of manufacture, expiry, sterile, single-use, etc.

title.en: Medical devices - Information to be supplied by the manufacturer
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 制造商应提供的信息

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for information to be supplied by the manufacturer with a medical device, including content, form and language of labels, instructions for use and technical descriptions.
standards.scope: Requirements for manufacturer-supplied information (labels, IFU, technical descriptions).
standards.note: Being superseded by ISO 20417 series but still referenced in some national implementations.

title.en: Medical devices - Part 1: Application of usability engineering to medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 第1部分：可用性工程在医疗器械中的应用

standards.abstract: Specifies a process for manufacturer to analyse, specify, develop and evaluate usability of a medical device as it relates to safety. Critical for ensuring labelling and IFU are understandable. EN IEC 62366-1:2015/A1:2020 harmonized under EU MDR.
standards.scope: Usability engineering process for medical device labelling and user interface design.
standards.note: Directly impacts labelling design: user comprehension testing, IFU readability, symbol recognition.
